He started up; his eyeballs glared like those of a maniac; every muscle, every feature was convulsed. ‘Who talks of murderers? They? He? _I_ did it. I, Bill Murdock, and the devil. _He_ was there; I see him grinning by the fire now. Ha, ha! I can hear _his_ screams, my God, my God! as I’ve heard ’em every day since. I hear ’em now.
